name: ev_charging
description: An EV charging station: cars wait in a queue, plug into a bank of chargers, draw power as they charge, can be throttled to share a station-wide load limit, and unplug when done.

card.description: An EV charging station: cars wait in a queue, plug into a bank of chargers, draw power as they charge, can be throttled to share a station-wide load limit, and unplug when done.

rules: The station total draw (total_load) never exceeds load_limit kW.
plug: move the front queued car into the first free charger; it draws no power until charged. No-op if no bay is free or the queue is empty.

charge: advance one tick; each occupied, unfinished charger draws its rate (throttled_rate if throttled, else default_rate), granted in charger order so the station total stays within load_limit, and its SoC rises in proportion to the granted rate, capped at the car's target.
throttle: cap every occupied charger at throttled_rate to fit more cars under load_limit; does not advance time.
unplug: release a finished car (SoC >= target) if any, else the first occupied bay; frees the bay and counts it served only if it left at target.

emit.report: t={time}: load {total_load}/{load_limit} kW, served {served}, {queue_len} waiting across {num_chargers} chargers.

objectives.name: queue_wait
objectives.goal: minimize cars left waiting in queue
